name: handigraphs-stats-api
description: Discover and query live Handigraphs MLB and NHL statistics through a read-only local MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Query live MLB and NHL analytics
interface.longDescription: Use a read-only local MCP server to discover Handigraphs resources, inspect live metrics and splits, and query MLB or NHL statistics.
defaultPrompt: Compare today's MLB starters using live Handigraphs data.
Find the strongest NHL goalie matchups available today.
Show which Handigraphs stats and splits are available.
